media.notes: Tech-leaning business/finance newsletter, startup-driven audience. Now part of HubSpot. Verify current sponsorship terms directly.

media.notes: Daily 5-minute crypto briefing, meme-friendly tone. Best overall crypto newsletter by subscriber count in 2026 -- good top-of-funnel awareness for crypto-curious retail.

media.name: Bankless
media.notes: Already flagged in Leads tab as a media-partnership candidate (not just an influencer). Free + paid tiers, deep DeFi/Ethereum audience. Verify current newsletter subscriber count directly.

media.name: Blockworks Daily
media.notes: Single-topic daily brief, institutional-credible tone. One of seven Blockworks newsletters, all free. Verify current subscriber count directly.

media.name: Messari
media.notes: Research-heavy crypto newsletter/platform. Good fit for the Fintech Generalist/quant crowd rather than casual retail.
